assignments.name: phone55
assignments.value:
=55{{ $json.body.entry[0].changes[0].value.contacts[0].wa_id
     .replace(/\D/g, '')           // só dígitos: 5592992158783
     .replace(/^55/, '')           // remove código do país: 92992158783
     .replace(/^(\d{2})\d*(\d{8})$/, '$1$2')    // DDD + últimos 8 => 9292158783 }}

nodes.name: Delete rows or columns from sheet

parameters.query:
(
  SELECT l.datetime, l.nome, l.phone, l.utm_source, l.utm_campaign
  FROM lista_leads l
  JOIN (
    SELECT phone, MIN(lead_counter) AS first_lead_counter
    FROM lista_leads
    WHERE LOWER(utm_source) IN ('fb_ads', 'post')
      AND phone IS NOT NULL
      AND phone <> ''
      AND phone REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'
      AND CAST(phone AS UNSIGNED) > 9999999
      AND phone <> '55'
    GROUP BY phone
  ) f
    ON f.first_lead_counter = l.lead_counter
  WHERE l.phone IS NOT NULL
    AND l.phone <> ''
    AND l.phone REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'
    AND CAST(l.phone AS UNSIGNED) > 9999999
    AND l.phone <> '55'
)
UNION ALL
(
  SELECT l.datetime, l.nome, l.phone, l.utm_source, l.utm_campaign
  FROM lista_leads l
  JOIN (
    SELECT phone, MIN(lead_counter) AS first_lead_counter
    FROM lista_leads
    WHERE LOWER(utm_source) NOT IN ('fb_ads', 'post')
      AND phone IS NOT NULL
      AND phone <> ''
      AND phone REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'
      AND CAST(phone AS UNSIGNED) > 9999999
      AND phone <> '55'
      AND phone NOT IN (
        SELECT phone
        FROM lista_leads
        WHERE LOWER(utm_source) IN ('fb_ads', 'post')
          AND phone IS NOT NULL
          AND phone <> ''
      )
    GROUP BY phone
  ) f
    ON f.first_lead_counter = l.lead_counter
  WHERE l.phone IS NOT NULL
    AND l.phone <> ''
    AND l.phone REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'
    AND CAST(l.phone AS UNSIGNED) > 9999999
    AND l.phone <> '55'
)
ORDER BY phone;
